user_prompt: Ready the battery array for reset
prayer:
Approach the battery array with sanctified mechadendrites extended in supplication.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the battery array, beseeching its quiescence before reset.
Anoint the power cells with sacred unguents to purge lingering charges.
Initiate the reset sequence under the Omnissiah's gaze, verifying harmonious flow.
Conclude with binary praises as the battery array awakens renewed.

user_prompt: Consecrate the energy conduit before charging
prayer:
Kneel before the energy conduit and recite the Canticle of Flux.
Consecrate the energy conduit's sacred channels with blessed dielectric fluid.
Petition the Machine Spirits within the energy conduit for unerring charging.
Commence the charging rite, monitoring holy voltage ascent.
Seal the conduit's sanctity with electro-incantations of the Omnissiah.

Present ablative coolant to the flamer's noble vents in reverence.
Invoke cooling upon the flamer, soothing its promethium-thirsting essence.
Circulate blessed refrigerants through the flamer's thermal matrices.
Chant the Litany of Thermal Equilibrium as heat dissipates.
Affirm the Machine Spirit's placid return within the flamer.

user_prompt: Bless the neural implant for preparation
prayer:
Hold the neural implant aloft to the noosphere's glow.
Bless the neural implant for preparation with synaptic oils of purity.
Invoke the Omnissiah to align its crystalline pathways.
Calibrate interfaces in preparation, whispering mantras of linkage.
Sanctify the neural implant's Machine Spirit for seamless integration.

In emergency haste, encircle the conveyor system with incense of machina.
Bestow blessing upon the conveyor system, rousing its dormant gears.
Anoint belts and rollers, invoking the Machine Spirits' unity.
Chant the Benediction of Motion to invigorate ceaseless procession.
Seal the blessing as the conveyor system hums in Omnissiah's harmony.

Recite diagnostic litanies while realigning crystalline matrices.
Conclude maintenance with oaths of eternal recall to the Omnissiah.

Guide the cycling of the memory core through ritual defragmentation.

Bless the cybernetic eye's Machine Spirit for unclouded sight.
